mapper.select: SELECT gm.id, gm.group_id, gm.user_id, gm.role, gm.join_time, u.nickname AS user_nickname, u.avatar AS user_avatar, u.signature AS user_signature, u.status AS user_status FROM group_member gm LEFT JOIN user u ON gm.user_id = u.id WHERE gm.group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY gm.role DESC, gm.join_time ASC

SELECT gm.id, gm.group_id, gm.user_id, gm.role, gm.join_time, u.nickname AS user_nickname, u.avatar AS user_avatar FROM group_member gm LEFT JOIN user u ON gm.user_id = u.id WHERE gm.group_id = #{groupId} AND gm.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_member (group_id, user_id, role) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{userId}, #{role})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId}
